results.title: World News | UAE Participates in EBRD Board of Governors Meeting
results.description: Get latest articles and stories on World at LatestLY. The United Arab Emirates, represented by the Ministry of Finance, participates in the Annual Meeting of the Board of Governors of the European Bank for Reconstruction and Development (EBRD), hosted in the Latvian capital, Riga, from 5th to 7th June 2026.

results.title: Relux Collision Mandates Pre- and Post-Repair Electronic Scanning for All Vehicles
results.description: Image: https://www.globalnewslines.com/uploads/2026/05/1779876973.jpg "Many drivers assume visible damage tells the full story after an accident, though modern vehicles often store hidden faults in electronic systems," a company spokesperson shared.
